components.name: Table
components.description: Renders tabular data with support for sorting, row selection, sticky columns, loading skeletons, and customizable cell slots.

components.name: TableHeader
components.description: A single table header cell supporting text or checkbox variants, sortable columns, and loading state.

components.name: TableCell
components.description: A single table body cell supporting variants like content, chip, datetime, icon, image, and checkbox.

components.name: TableCellContent
components.description: Renders a two-line content cell with a title and optional description, supporting links.

components.name: TableLink
components.description: Wraps table cell content in a router-link or anchor.

components.name: ExpandingTable
components.description: A tree-structured table that supports collapsible/expandable rows with nested data.

components.name: ExpandingTableRow
components.description: A single row within an ExpandingTable, supporting depth indentation and nested children.

components.name: ExpandingHeaderRow
components.description: The header row for an ExpandingTable component.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Page navigation control with prev/next and numbered page buttons.

components.name: PrevNext
components.description: A single previous or next navigation button used within Pagination.

components.name: PaginationNumber
components.description: A single numbered page button used within Pagination.

components.name: Overview
components.description: A grouped set of OverviewItem cards displaying key metrics with icons.

components.name: OverviewIcon
components.description: A colored icon badge used inside OverviewItem.

components.name: OverviewItem
components.description: A single metric card showing a title, value, icon, and optional percentage change.

components.name: CustomerCard
components.description: Displays customer or beneficiary details in small, big, or float layout variants.

components.name: TransferSummary
components.description: Shows a summary of a money transfer including amount, fee, method, and FX rate.

components.name: ListItem
components.description: A versatile list row supporting timeline, webhook, payment, terminal, general, and accordion layouts.

components.name: ListUrl
components.description: Displays a labelled URL with an optional copy button.

components.name: ListDetail
components.description: A label-value pair row in horizontal or vertical alignment, with optional copy tooltip.

components.name: InfoCard
components.description: A content card with a title, optional loading state, hover effect, and header/footer slots.

components.name: ProgressBar
components.description: A step-based linear progress bar showing current step out of total steps.

components.name: FloatContent
components.description: A floating side panel (left or right) with title, description, and dropdown actions.

components.name: HorizontalProgressbar
components.description: A horizontal bar showing progress as a ratio of current to max value.

components.name: OcOnboardingListItem
components.description: An onboarding checklist row with a number badge, status, and action button.

components.name: OcOnboardingRecap
components.description: A collapsible recap card for onboarding sections, showing completed field values.

components.name: OcAccountVerificationContent
components.description: A page-level container for account verification steps with header, body, and footer slots.

components.name: OcAccountVerificationBox
components.description: A selectable verification option card with icon, description, and chips.

components.name: NewTable
components.description: A modern table component supporting row expansion, selection, loading, and named column slots.

components.name: OcRowItemData
components.description: A compact list of labeled data items, each optionally showing a chip, copy button, or icon.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: A collapsible section with a header and body, supporting animated expand/collapse.

components.name: OnboardingAccordion
components.description: An onboarding-styled accordion with a status variant (completed, error, pending, etc.).

components.name: OnboardingProductOption
components.description: A selectable product option card with image, title, and description.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: A horizontal or vertical tab bar for switching between named views.

components.name: PaymentTab
components.description: A styled tab selector for payment method tabs.

components.name: Steps
components.description: A step indicator showing progress through a multi-step flow.

components.name: Step
components.description: A single step indicator within a Steps component.

components.name: Variants
components.description: A group of selectable variant options, each with a label and icon.

components.name: Variant
components.description: A single selectable variant card with icon and label.

components.name: SwitchTabs
components.description: A segmented control for switching between a small set of options.

components.name: Header
components.description: The top-level application header shell.

components.name: SubHeader
components.description: A secondary header below the main header.

components.name: HeaderLeft
components.description: The left section of a Header component.

components.name: HeaderCenter
components.description: The center section of a Header with an optional back button and saved state.

components.name: HeaderRight
components.description: The right section of a Header with primary and secondary action buttons.

components.name: TabToSelect
components.description: A tab bar that triggers path changes, used inside the Header.

components.name: Checklist
components.description: A single checklist step item with an index number, label, and completion state.

components.name: PageTitle
components.description: A page-level title bar with back button, copy value, chip, and primary/secondary action buttons.

components.name: PrimaryActions
components.description: Renders primary action buttons or dropdowns within a PageTitle.

components.name: PageTitleRight
components.description: The right action area of a PageTitle with primary and secondary buttons.

components.name: Sidebar
components.description: The main application sidebar with expandable menus, logo, and footer slots.

components.name: SidebarSubmenu
components.description: An expandable submenu section within the Sidebar.

components.name: AccountSetup
components.description: An account setup progress widget shown inside the Sidebar.

components.name: SidebarHead
components.description: The header section of a Sidebar group.

components.name: SideBarMenu
components.description: A single menu item in the Sidebar, supporting badges, children, and expanded state.

components.name: SidebarSubMenuItem
components.description: A child menu item within a SidebarSubmenu.

components.name: SidebarFooter
components.description: The footer section of the Sidebar.

components.name: SidebarFeatureBanners
components.description: Promotional feature banners displayed at the bottom of the Sidebar.

components.name: AccountSetupProgress
components.description: A circular progress indicator for account setup completion shown in the Sidebar.

components.name: SubSidebar
components.description: A secondary sidebar for sub-navigation within a section.

components.name: EmptyPage
components.description: A placeholder page shown when a list or section has no data.

components.name: AdditionalContent
components.description: A flexible side panel showing customer info, overview items, payment methods, and action buttons.

components.name: InfoCardButton
components.description: A selectable card button showing a title, content, and optional chip or dropdown.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: A loading placeholder that mimics content shape while data is loading.

components.name: FeatureOverviewCard
components.description: A card listing product features with icons, used in feature overview or upgrade pages.

components.name: SandboxBanner
components.description: A top banner indicating the user is in sandbox/test mode.

components.name: TopBanner
components.description: A dismissible top-of-page announcement or action-required banner.

components.name: Box
components.description: A clickable card box with an icon, title, description, and active state.

components.name: OcSection
components.description: A content section wrapper with an optional title and header-right slot.

components.name: AuthenticationOption
components.description: A selectable authentication method card with icon and active indicator.

components.name: VerificationOption
components.description: A selectable verification method card with icon, chip badge, and active state.

components.name: Chip
components.description: A small status or category badge with variants for color, style (background/transparent/outlined), icon, and close button.

components.name: Snackbar
components.description: A toast notification supporting floating and inline modes, colors, icons, and action buttons.

components.name: Banner
components.description: An inline notification banner with an icon, title, content, and optional dismiss button.

components.name: ShareIcon
components.description: An icon button for sharing via a specific channel (e.g. WhatsApp) with a tooltip.

components.name: Tag
components.description: A small colored label tag for status or category annotation.

components.name: BaseInput
components.description: A form field wrapper providing label, hint, error message, and tooltip slot.

components.name: Button
components.description: A primary action button with variants (primary, secondary, destructive), sizes, icons, and loading state.

components.name: CardInput
components.description: A credit card number input with card type detection and inline label support.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: A single checkbox input with label, hint, error, and button-variant style.

components.name: CheckboxesGroup
components.description: A group of checkboxes with select-all support and vertical/horizontal alignment.

components.name: Criteria
components.description: A read-only criteria indicator showing a label with a pass/fail state.

components.name: Input
components.description: A standard text input with icon, prefix, inline label, password toggle, and validation support.

components.name: InputOption
components.description: A tag-style input that lets users add multiple free-text options.

components.name: PhoneInput
components.description: A phone number input with integrated country code selector.

components.name: Radio
components.description: A single radio button with label, hint, tooltip, and button-variant styles.

components.name: RadioGroup
components.description: A group of radio buttons with vertical/horizontal layout.

components.name: RangeInput
components.description: A dual numeric input for entering a min/max range.

components.name: Select
components.description: A dropdown selector supporting single/multi select, filtering, async search, and grouped options.

components.name: Option
components.description: A single option item used inside a Select dropdown.

components.name: GroupOptions
components.description: A labeled group of Option items within a Select dropdown.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: A on/off toggle switch with label and disabled state.

components.name: LinkInput
components.description: An input for entering a social or custom link with platform selector.

components.name: TextArea
components.description: A multi-line text input with auto-resize, label, hint, and error support.

components.name: Calendar
components.description: A standalone date or date-range calendar picker.

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: A date or date-range picker input with popover calendar, shortcuts, and format options.

components.name: Slider
components.description: A range or single value slider with configurable min, max, and step.

components.name: SectionItem
components.description: A settings row with a title, description, optional toggle, and action slot.

components.name: SelectOptions
components.description: A visual option picker in grid or list layout supporting text, icon, or image options.

components.name: SingleFileUpload
components.description: A file upload input for a single file with preview, size limit, and crop support.

components.name: MultipleUploadFile
components.description: A file upload input for multiple files with preview grid and size/count limits.

components.name: NumberInput
components.description: A numeric input with increment/decrement buttons.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: A user or business avatar in multiple sizes and types (default, business, image).

components.name: Icon
components.description: Renders an SVG icon by name from the OrchidUI icon library.

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: A popover dropdown menu attached to a trigger element.

components.name: DropdownItem
components.description: A single item row within a Dropdown menu, supporting icon, text, and badges.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: A hover or click tooltip/popover with configurable placement and content slot.

components.name: Modal
components.description: A dialog modal with header, body, footer, confirm/cancel buttons, and size variants.

components.name: OcModalPage
components.description: A full-screen modal page with optional back button and close icon.

components.name: ConfirmationModal
components.description: A pre-styled confirmation dialog for delete, success, warning, or question actions.

components.name: Popper
components.description: A low-level positioning wrapper using Popper.js for custom overlays.

components.name: SupportMenu
components.description: A floating support/help menu with grouped links and a bottom action bar.

components.name: CopyTooltip
components.description: Wraps any element to copy a value to clipboard and show a confirmation tooltip.

components.name: WhiteList
components.description: A feature gate card shown when a feature is unavailable for the user's plan.

components.name: Theme
components.description: Wraps the app to apply a color mode (light/dark) via CSS variables.

components.name: FormBuilder
components.description: A dynamic form renderer that builds form fields from a JSON schema with grid layout support.

components.name: DataTable
components.description: A full-featured data table with integrated filtering, search, pagination, column config, and bulk actions.

components.name: FilterSearch
components.description: The search input component used within DataTable's filter toolbar.

components.name: FilterSearchFor
components.description: Displays active search/filter query chips with remove controls.

components.name: FilterForm
components.description: A filter form panel driven by a JSON schema, used inside DataTable.

components.name: ComplexCalendar
components.description: A full calendar panel with range selection, shortcuts, and submit/cancel actions.

components.name: ComplexDatePicker
components.description: A date range picker input using ComplexCalendar, with label and format options.

components.name: ModalCropper
components.description: A modal-based image cropper with upload and crop controls.

components.name: Cropper
components.description: An inline image cropper with optional replace functionality.

components.name: Draggable
components.description: A drag-and-drop wrapper that makes a list reorderable.

components.name: DraggableList
components.description: A styled draggable list with icon, title, action slots, and optional nested children.

components.name: EmojiPicker
components.description: An emoji selector popover input.

components.name: ThumbnailTheme
components.description: A theme selection card with preview thumbnail, activate/customize/publish actions.

components.name: ThumbnailSection
components.description: A section template card with preview image and add/customize actions.

components.name: SubPlanCard
components.description: A subscription plan tier card listing features and a select action.

components.name: TimePopup
components.description: A time picker popup component.

components.name: TimePicker
components.description: A time picker input with a popover clock and label support.
